simulation.result: Business list stored; local fallback was honestly labeled because the diagnostic process had no browser auth session.
Recommendation stored; legacy detector treated the phrase as follow-up.

simulation.message: So number 3 how do we implement?
simulation.result: Number 3 still resolved indirectly, but activation was wrong because the number matcher was start-anchored.

simulation.message: What trading strategy do you recommend?

rootCause: detectActivationLevel defaulted to Level 4 whenever any conversation memory existed, even without a reference marker.
Casual/identity and explicit domain classification did not run before memory/default activation.
The Level 4 answer builder defaulted to the business recommendation for every unmatched local-reasoning message.
Reasoning had no memory-eligibility guard or topic boundary.
The follow-up number matcher did not recognize a prefixed phrase such as 'So number 3'.
patchTarget: Activation pre-check order, topic-boundary eligibility, domain-specific answer routing, and guarded reasoning context.
